meaning: n.消费税,货物税,国产税vt.收税,切除
examples: There has been a sharp increase in vehicle excise.
After the furore which greeted our first report I felt pusillanimously that we should excise this explanatory passage.
She must excise every scrap of cancerous tissue.
The bill would, on its face, repeal a controversial 2.3% excise tax on medical devices.
Now, as I was only vaguely aware, there is a federal excise tax on air transportation.
